ddls:
CREATE TABLE "personal_information" (
  "info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of personal information */,
  "info_category" TEXT /* Category of personal information (e.g., identifiers, geolocation data) */,
  "info_type" TEXT /* Specific type of information (e.g., email, phone number) */,
  "collected_last_12_months" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category was collected in the last 12 months */,
  "collected_date" TEXT /* Date when the information was collected */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the information will expire or be deleted */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the information is sensitive */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Rating of the data quality (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "source_category" TEXT /* Source categories from which the information is collected */,
  "use_purpose" TEXT /* Business purposes for collecting and using the information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("info_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., website, mobile app) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., website, mobile app, API) */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `data_collection_methods` table to specify the method used to collect data from this source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose */,
  "purpose_description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose for data collection */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the purpose is primary or secondary */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the purpose was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_parties_disclosed" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each third party */,
  "party_category" TEXT /* Category name of the third party */,
  "disclosure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for disclosing information to this third party */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the third party */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contract_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract with the third party was signed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_parties_sold" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each third party */,
  "party_category" TEXT /* Category name of the third party */,
  "sale_reason" TEXT /* Reason for selling or sharing information with this third party */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the third party */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contract_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract with the third party was signed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_consent" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing consent */,
  "info_id" INTEGER /* ID of the information category */,
  "consent_status" INTEGER /* Status of the user's consent (true for granted, false for revoked) */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when consent was provided or revoked */,
  "consent_type" TEXT /* Type of consent (e.g., explicit, implicit) */,
  "consent_duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the consent is valid */,
  "consent_revocation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for revoking consent (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_consent_info_id FOREIGN KEY ("info_id") REFERENCES personal_information ("info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_consent_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method (e.g., online forms, cookies) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method used */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of method (e.g., form, cookie, API) */,
  "method_version" TEXT /* Version of the method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details regarding the action performed */,
  "action_by" TEXT /* ID of the user or system performing the action */,
  "action_by_type" TEXT /* Type of the user or system (e.g., admin, system) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breaches" (
  "breach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breach record */,
  "breach_date" TEXT /* Date when the breach occurred */,
  "users_impacted" INTEGER /* Number of users impacted by the breach */,
  "breach_description" TEXT /* Description of the breach incident */,
  "breach_type" TEXT /* Type of breach (e.g., unauthorized access, data leak) */,
  "breach_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the breach (e.g., critical, high, medium, low) */,
  "remediation_date" TEXT /* Date when the breach was remediated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation (e.g., GDPR, CCPA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation became effective */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction where the regulation applies (e.g., EU, California) */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Current compliance status (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation was last reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the request */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, fulfilled) */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., access, deletion, correction) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the request */,
  "request_fulfilling_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was fulfilled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_protection_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data protection officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the officer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the officer (e.g., DPO, CISO) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the officer started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the officer's role ends (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)
